author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Polynomial APIs had no NaN/Inf input validation; non-finite values silently produced garbage in three error-prone paths. Added validation in mapping::validate_domain_window (covers all 6 bases through with_domain/with_window), roots::find_roots_from_power_coeffs (per-coefficient check), and fitting::least_squares_fit (Vandermonde entries + y values; weights already covered by existing #256 rejection).

NaN-tolerant operations (eval, add, sub, mul, deriv, integ) keep their NaN-propagation - matches numpy's arithmetic convention.

7 tests added covering all rejection paths.

ferray-polynomial: 160 -> 167 tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 87b9a1d2.
